rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID J CLARK
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance Beyond 75 Mile Radius Of Despondent'S Residence.
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's motion to compel attendance at deposition is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, as amended by AB 3078, Chapter 171, Statutes of 2004, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. As this motion was filed on January 6, 2005, the new provisions apply. The first day this motion could be noticed for is January 31, 2005. (610/BCHAN)
